---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new CLI feature, flag, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 What's your idea?

<!-- A clear description of the feature -->

## 🙋 Why would this be useful?

<!-- Who benefits? What problem does it solve? -->

## 🔧 Type of change

- [ ] New CLI flag or option
- [ ] New category
- [ ] UI / display improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Other

## 📝 Implementation ideas (optional)

<!-- How do you think this could be built? -->

## ✅ Are you willing to open a PR?

- [ ] Yes!
- [ ] No, just suggesting
